description: Abandoned carts never release their reserved stock, so inventory shows sold-out while units sit unsold.
body: Failure mode: reservations have no expiry, so abandoned carts pin stock indefinitely and the SKU appears sold-out while real units remain unsold. Detection signals: reserved quantity far exceeding active payable carts; available stock at zero with healthy on-hand; reservations far older than the cart TTL. Do not hold reservations without a release path. Safer fallback: attach a TTL to every reservation, release on expiry or abandonment, and reconcile on-hand against available plus reserved plus sold.
